---
title: "Lieutenant Colonel Edward Walter"
---

## Lieutenant Colonel Edward Walter

**Dates:** (1804- 10 Dec 1862)

### Description

father-in-law of JBY

### Biography

He retired in 1851 as Lt-Col 3rd Bombay Light Cavalry.  He married, first, Mary Emma Coulthard and, secondly (1853), Caroline Jeannette [or Janetta] Bignell, who married subsequently the Rev. James Beck. He was the son of W. Walter, and descended from John Walter the founder of <i>The Times</i>.  His daughter Frances Walter married JBY;  his daughter Gertrude lived with CMY from the 1870s;  CMY also often mentions his daughters Mary (Walter) Woolcombe and Louisa (Walter) Halliday.  [BL OIOC MSS and East India Register Jan 1863; marriage index]

### Letters

- Letter from May 10th [1885]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]
- Letter from September 10, 1858.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
